summary: Frontend testing iteration 7 - All 5 features verified working. Cost Estimator shows all 12 months, visa/document buttons open modals directly without navigation, Top 5 Destinations section displays correctly and updates with month selection.
passed_tests: Feature 1: Cost Estimator month selector shows all 12 months (Jan-Dec) in flex-wrap wrapped rows
Feature 2: 'Check Eligibility' button is a BUTTON element (not link), opens VisaEligibilityChecker modal directly without URL change
Feature 3: 'Document Checklist' button is a BUTTON element (not link), opens DocumentChecklistGenerator modal directly without URL change
Feature 4: Top 5 Destinations section displays with data-testid='top-destinations-section', shows 5 country cards with ranking, flag, name, highlight, rating, and category
Feature 5: Top 5 Destinations section updates when month is changed - March shows Japan, India, Egypt, Morocco, Peru; January shows Thailand, Maldives, Sri Lanka, UAE, Australia
Top 5 Destinations header updates dynamically: 'Top 5 Destinations for March' -> 'Top 5 Destinations for January'
Country Detail Modal shows 'Check Eligibility' and 'Document Checklist' buttons in Visa Information section
Visa Eligibility Checker modal opens as overlay with step wizard (Step 1: Basic Information)
Document Checklist Generator modal opens as overlay with form fields (Destination Country, Visa Type, Purpose of Visit)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 requested features verified working: (1) CostEstimator.js month selector uses flex-wrap to display all 12 months in wrapped rows, (2-3) CountryDetailModal.js now uses <button> elements with onClick handlers to open VisaEligibilityChecker and DocumentChecklistGenerator modals directly instead of navigating to /visa page, (4-5) Seasons.js has topDestinationsData object with month-based recommendations and Top 5 Destinations section that updates dynamically based on selected month.

features_verified.cost_estimator_12_months: CostEstimator.js lines 337-354: MONTHS array has all 12 months, flex-wrap layout displays them in wrapped rows
features_verified.visa_eligibility_modal: CountryDetailModal.js lines 404-409: <button> with onClick={() => setShowEligibilityChecker(true)} - no href, no navigation
features_verified.document_checklist_modal: CountryDetailModal.js lines 410-417: <button> with onClick={() => setShowDocumentChecklist(true)} - no href, no navigation
features_verified.top_5_destinations_section: Seasons.js lines 389-436: topDestinationsData object with 12 months of recommendations, section with data-testid='top-destinations-section'
features_verified.top_5_destinations_updates: Seasons.js uses selectedMonthAbbrev to filter topDestinationsData and update header/cards dynamically
